plan.failureSummary: The test failed because a cached selector for the 'occupation' field could not be found on the current page. The application ('unstable-survey') appears to have a dynamic or randomized UI structure.
observedIndicators: High flakiness score (0.78) with alternating pass/fail history
Visual mismatch: Cache expected 'occupation' but UI shows 'Age Group' radio buttons

remediationSteps.details: Execute the test with 'clearPageAiCache: true'. This will force the Donobu agent to re-analyze the page in autonomous mode and adapt to the current form structure.

remediationSteps.summary: Consider disabling deterministic mode for this unstable UI.
remediationSteps.details: If this test continues to fail due to dynamic UI changes, consider disabling DETERMINISTIC mode for this specific test case or using more robust semantic instructions that don't rely on field order.

plan.notes: The flow history shows a clear pattern of alternating success and failure, and the app name 'unstable-survey' strongly suggests intentional UI instability. Deterministic mode is failing because the cached layout (which expected an occupation dropdown) does not match the current run (which shows 'Age Group' radio buttons). Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the current layout.
